### Proposed Change Review

#### Old Configuration:
```bash
--device nvidia.com/gpu=all -p 8000:8000 --model Qwen2.5-7B
```

#### New Configuration:
```bash
start fast and strong services both with --device nvidia.com/gpu=all, fast on 8000, strong on 8001, both gpu_memory_utilization=0.92.
```

### Bugs Found:
